commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes channel inbound/outbound helper ownership under new channel-inbound/channel-outbound SDK surfaces, migrates bundled channel imports, deprecates older subpaths, and routes more inbound dispatch through core helpers.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: imports or calls to shipped v2026.5.22 symbols such as runtime.channel.turn.run, buildChannelTurnContext, and runInboundReplyTurn no longer resolve against the PR head. Signal empty-body quote metadata also has a direct source path through entry.replyToBody gating.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer handling is needed because the remaining blockers include public SDK compatibility direction, a protected maintainer label, dirty merge state, and contributor-owned real behavior proof.
